name: checkMediaLaw
description: Check if the given media content complies with media law regulations

content.description: The media content that needs to be checked for legal compliance

name: Astronomy API
description: Provides up-to-string astronomy information, including sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, moon phase, and illumination.

q.description: Query parameter based on which data is sent back. It could be a latitude and longitude (Decimal degree), city name, US zip, UK postcode, Canada postal code, metar code, iata code, or IP address.

dt.description: Optional string parameter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

name: Get Title Images
description: Retrieve photo shots of a movie title from the online movie database.

tconst.description: The ID of the movie title, in the format 'ttXXXXXXX' (e.g., 'tt0944947').

limit.description: The maximum number of images to return (up to 100).

name: Thai Lottery Draw Date Listing
description: Retrieve the string listing of Thai Lottery draw results.

name: find_nearby_cafes
description: Find nearby cafes based on user's location

latitude.description: The latitude of the user's location

longitude.description: The longitude of the user's location

radius.description: The maximum distance in meters from the user's location

name: All Belgian Races
description: Retrieve a list of all horse races in Belgium, including details such as race name, string, time, and location.

location.description: Filter races by location (e.g. Brussels, Antwerp, etc.)

name: Web Page Lookup
description: Retrieve information about a web page, including its Genius ID, annotations, and other relevant details.

raw_annotatable_url.description: The URL of the web page to look up

og_url.description: The URL as specified by an og:url meta tag in the page's head

canonical_url.description: The URL as specified by a canonical link tag in the page's head

text_format.description: The format for text bodies related to the document (defaults to html)

name: getAstrobiologyResearch
description: Retrieve research and information about astrobiology

topic.description: The specific topic related to astrobiology research (e.g., extremophiles, exoplanets, origin of life)

name: Top News Fetcher
description: Fetches a list of top news articles from the Sports domain

locale.description: The locale to use for the news articles

name: Web Search
description: This endpoint is used for web searches, allowing users to retrieve a list of search results based on a query and optional parameters.

lr.description: Restricts the search to documents written in a particular language

gl.description: The gl parameter value is a two-letter country code. The gl parameter boosts search results whose country of origin matches the parameter value

num.description: Number of search results to return.

start.description: The index of the first result to return.

name: Keyword Search at Coordinate Point
description: Search for keywords at a specific coordinate point on a map and return search results without rank comparison data.

zoom.description: Google Maps zoom level. Allowed values: 0-18. Default: 13.

name: /titles/{id}/main_actors
description: Retrieves the main actors of a movie based on its IMDB ID.

id.description: IMDB ID of the title (e.g., tt0000002)

name: Get Litecoin Block Hash
description: Retrieve the hash of a Litecoin block, allowing you to get detailed information about the block.

block_number.description: The block number for which you want to retrieve the hash.

name: getAllInboxes
description: List inboxes in paginated form. The results are available on the `content` property of the returned object. This method allows for page index (zero based), page size (how many results to return), and a sort direction (based on createdAt time). You Can also filter by whether an inbox is favorited or use email address pattern. This method is the recommended way to query inboxes. The alternative `getInboxes` method returns a full list of inboxes but is limited to 100 results.

sort.description: Optional createdAt sort direction ASC or DESC

page.description: Optional page index in list pagination

before.description: Optional filter by created before given string time

since.description: Optional filter by created after given string time

size.description: Optional page size in list pagination

tag.description: Optionally filter by tags. Will return inboxes that include given tags

favourite.description: Optionally filter results for favourites only

search.description: Optionally filter by search words partial matching ID, tags, name, and email address

teamAccess.description: DEPRECATED. Optionally filter by team access.

name: createBrand
description: Create a new brand in the marketing platform

description.description: A brief description of the brand

name: area-code
description: Get the International Country Calling Code and the Local Area Code information for a given country and region.

country.description: ISO 2 letter country code or Name of the Country in English

region.description: Geographic Region (e.g. City). No accented letter is required.

name: Basketball Player Statistics Seasons
description: Retrieve the seasons' statistics of a basketball player.

id.description: The player ID to retrieve the statistics seasons.

name: Send Voice OTP
description: Sends an auto-generated voice OTP to an Indian phone number

phone_number.description: The 10-digit Indian phone number to send the OTP to

name: MathDifferential.calculateEquation
description: Solves a given differential equation using specified initial conditions and methods.

equation.description: The differential equation to be solved.

initialConditions.description: Initial conditions for solving the differential equation.

method.description: The numerical method to be used for solving the equation.

name: Football Player Details
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific football player.

id.description: The unique identifier of the football player.

name: evolutionaryAlgorithm
description: Implement an evolutionary algorithm for problem optimization

problem.description: The problem to be optimized (e.g., traveling salesman problem, knapsack problem)

population_size.description: The size of the population in the evolutionary algorithm

mutation_rate.description: The rate at which mutations occur during reproduction

max_generations.description: The maximum number of generations to run the evolutionary algorithm for

name: Get Horoscope Signs
description: Returns a list of 12 horoscope sign names.

name: getEmails
description: Retrieves a list of emails received by an inbox. The API allows filtering and sorting of emails based on various parameters.

inboxId.description: Id of the inbox that emails belong to

retryTimeout.description: Maximum milliseconds to spend retrying the inbox database until the minimum acceptable email count is satisfied

unreadOnly.description: Filter emails by unread status (default: true)

sort.description: Sort the results by received string and direction (ASC or DESC, default: ASC)

since.description: Exclude emails received before this ISO 8601 string time

delayTimeout.description: Maximum milliseconds to wait for emails to arrive before retrying

before.description: Exclude emails received after this ISO 8601 string time

size.description: Alias for limit. Assessed first before assessing any passed limit

limit.description: Limit the result set, ordered by received string time sort direction (maximum 100)

name: Check Coin Legitimacy
description: Check the legitimacy of a cryptocurrency coin by slug and returns relevant information about the coin.

slug.description: The slug of the cryptocurrency coin to be checked.

name: homogenizer.monitor_valve_performance
description: Monitor and report the performance of homogenizer valves over a specified time period.

start_date.description: Start date for monitoring in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: End date for monitoring in YYYY-MM-DD format.

items.description: Types of performance metrics to monitor.

performance_metrics.description: List of performance metrics to be monitored.

name: getDataWarehouseStatus
description: Retrieve the current status of a data warehouse

warehouse_id.description: The ID of the data warehouse for which you want to retrieve the status

name: calculate_working_capital
description: Calculate the working capital of a business given its current assets and current liabilities.

business.description: Business for which the working capital is to be calculated.

current_assets.description: The total value of all current assets of the business.

current_liabilities.description: The total value of all current liabilities of the business.

time_period.description: The time period for which the working capital is to be calculated. Can be 'monthly', 'quarterly', or 'yearly'.

name: Resume API
description: A RESTful API for creating, updating, and retrieving resumes

profession.description: The profession or job role to generate a resume for

two.description: Experienced and results-oriented Store Manager with three years of managerial experience in retail environments.

six.description: Experienced and dedicated Art Gallery Manager with several years of experience effectively managing galleries and overseeing their day to day operations.

ten.description: Experienced and professional IT Manager with over eight years of valuable experience in monitoring project performance to ensure company success.

seven.description: Experienced Hair Stylist with over six years of experience cutting and styling hair.

three.description: Experienced and passionate Caterer with over five years of experience in the catering industry, serving clients throughout New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut.

eleven.description: Experienced and self-motivated Office Secretary with ten+ years of industry experience overseeing the main offices of schools.

nine.description: Resourceful and dedicated High School Student with strong analytical skills and a serious work ethic.

five.description: Experienced Nail Technician with several years of experience providing quality nails services to clients.

four.description: Reliable and experienced Housekeeper with over five years of experience maintaining the cleanliness and organization of residences and offices.

eight.description: Experienced and effective Operations Manager bringing forth valuable industry experience and a passion for management.

one.description: An ambitious web developer focused on front-end Ul/UX, with a penchant for creating innovative solutions to unsolvable problems.

Styles are the different versions in which an icon from a given family may appear. For example, an icon may be available in lineal, color, or lineal color styles.
